concepts.name: Derivative
concepts.short_definition: The instantaneous rate of change of a function.

concepts.name: Tangent Line
concepts.short_definition: A line that touches a curve at a single point and has the same slope as the curve at that point.

concepts.name: Local Extrema
concepts.short_definition: The highest or lowest points in a specific interval of a function.

concepts.name: Critical Point
concepts.short_definition: A point where the derivative of a function is zero or undefined.

concepts.name: First Derivative Test
concepts.short_definition: Uses the sign of the first derivative to determine if a critical point is a local maximum or minimum.

concepts.name: Absolute Extrema
concepts.short_definition: The highest or lowest points of a function over its entire domain or a specified closed interval.

concepts.name: Closed Interval Method
concepts.short_definition: Finds absolute extrema by evaluating the function at critical points and endpoints of a closed interval.

concepts.name: Increasing Function
concepts.short_definition: A function whose y-values increase as x-values increase.

concepts.name: Decreasing Function
concepts.short_definition: A function whose y-values decrease as x-values increase.

concepts.name: Concavity
concepts.short_definition: The curvature of a function's graph, indicating whether it is bending upwards or downwards.

concepts.name: Inflection Point
concepts.short_definition: A point on a curve where the concavity changes.

concepts.name: Second Derivative
concepts.short_definition: The derivative of the first derivative of a function.

concepts.name: Second Derivative Test
concepts.short_definition: Uses the sign of the second derivative at a critical point to determine if it's a local maximum or minimum.

concepts.name: Curve Sketching
concepts.short_definition: Using calculus tools to accurately draw the graph of a function.

concepts.name: Optimization
concepts.short_definition: Finding the maximum or minimum value of a quantity.

concepts.name: Related Rates
aliases: rates of change of related variables
concepts.short_definition: Problems where the rates of change of multiple variables are related by an equation.

concepts.name: Implicit Differentiation
concepts.short_definition: A technique for finding derivatives of implicitly defined functions.

concepts.name: L'Hôpital's Rule
concepts.short_definition: A method for evaluating limits of indeterminate forms.

concepts.name: Limits
concepts.short_definition: The value that a function approaches as the input approaches some value.

concepts.name: Indeterminate Form
concepts.short_definition: A limit expression that cannot be evaluated directly.

concepts.name: Differential
concepts.short_definition: An infinitesimal change in a variable.

concepts.name: Differentials for Approximation
concepts.short_definition: Using differentials to estimate function values.

concepts.name: Newton's Method
concepts.short_definition: An iterative method for finding approximations to the roots of a real-valued function.

concepts.name: Antiderivative
concepts.short_definition: A function whose derivative is a given function.

concepts.name: Integral
concepts.short_definition: The area under the curve of a function between two points.

concepts.name: Fundamental Theorem of Calculus
concepts.short_definition: Connects differentiation and integration.

concepts.name: Area Between Curves
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the area enclosed by two or more functions.

concepts.name: Volume of Revolution
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the volume of a solid generated by rotating a 2D shape around an axis.

concepts.name: Arc Length
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the length of a curve between two points.

concepts.name: Surface Area of Revolution
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the surface area of a solid generated by rotating a curve around an axis.

concepts.name: Work
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the work done by a force.

concepts.name: Center of Mass
concepts.short_definition: The average position of all the parts of the object.

concepts.name: Population Growth
concepts.short_definition: Modeling population changes over time.

concepts.name: Exponential Decay
concepts.short_definition: Modeling quantities that decrease at a rate proportional to their current value.

concepts.name: Differential Equations
concepts.short_definition: Equations involving derivatives of a function.

concepts.name: Mean Value Theorem
concepts.short_definition: Guarantees the existence of a point where the instantaneous rate of change equals the average rate of change.

concepts.name: Rolle's Theorem
concepts.short_definition: A special case of the Mean Value Theorem where the function values at the endpoints are equal.

concepts.name: Optimization Problems
concepts.short_definition: Applying calculus to solve real-world problems involving finding maximum or minimum values.

concepts.name: Applied Optimization
concepts.short_definition: Solving optimization problems in various fields like engineering, economics, and business.
